nodes.label: P2.1 synth — layer x layer CKA (partial homogenization)
nodes.rationale: WALL cell shows two blocky homogenized clusters (layers 1-5 vs 6-8, each near-uniform CKA>0.8 within-block); HERO cell (layer+lin) stays high-CKA almost everywhere except the very last layer -- a different, milder homogenization pattern than CIFAR's WALL cell.
